commands.summary: Vocabulary module tests, index and registry audit outcome fixtures (no-git unverifiable, drift stale, current verified_current, mixed rollup to stale, registry missing-target stale), and sidecar three-valued staleness tests all passed.
Full repository suite passed with 580 tests.
Repository audit returned ok true with verification_outcome verified_current.

Confirmed ai_lab/documentation/verification_outcome.py imports from neither ai_lab/documentation/self_model.py nor ai_lab/documentation/artifact_sidecar.py, while both consumers import the shared vocabulary.

summary: Verified that the deficiency described by GAP-0004 is resolved: audit verification outcomes no longer conflate missing evidence with confirmed drift, and no second incompatible verification vocabulary exists. Milestone 1 (commits 71abadc, bfaf694; PLAN-20260719-0001, CAP-0013, VERIFY-20260719-0001, WARR-20260719-0002): the self-model index and registry audits report the shared three-valued verification_outcome from ai_lab/documentation/verification_outcome.py with per-finding classification, warn severity for evidence-unavailable findings, emission-time evidence capture, deterministic rollup, and fail-closed boolean ok. Milestone 2 (commit 4c41f50; PLAN-20260717-0001): the sidecar contract adopts the same vocabulary; ai_lab/documentation/artifact_sidecar.py imports CLASS_DRIFT, CLASS_EVIDENCE_UNAVAILABLE, CLASS_OTHER, EVIDENCE_STATUS_NO_GIT_DIR, ok_from_outcome, and rollup_from_findings from the shared module, and assess_staleness returns verified_current on source hash match, stale with an error drift finding on mismatch, and unverifiable with a warn evidence-unavailable finding on a missing or unreadable source. The dependency direction is acyclic: audits and sidecar import the vocabulary; the vocabulary imports from neither. Vocabulary, severity policy, and rollup are identical across all three consumers. The original zip-export incident scenario now reports unverifiable with zero error findings instead of spurious drift errors, covered by fixture tests. COMP-0031 records unanimous provider recommendation to close GAP-0004 citing exactly this evidence. Tests: 580 passing including outcome fixtures in tests/test_self_model.py and three-valued staleness tests in tests/test_artifact_sidecar.py; repository audit ok true verified_current, reproduced in an independent clone.
